fields.label: Upload BRO CPT XML file
metadata: label: Upload BRO CPT XML file
description: BRO CPT XML file (dispatchDataResponse format)

fields.label: Pile tip level
metadata: description: Depth of pile tip relative to NAP (negative = below NAP)

fields.label: Pile diameter / width
metadata: description: Outer diameter (round) or side width (square)

fields.label: Pile type
metadata: description: Determines αp and αs factors per NEN 9997-1 Table A.3
options: Driven prefab concrete, Bored pile, CFA pile, Screw pile

fields.label: Surface level (ground level)
metadata: description: Pre-filled from CPT header; adjust if needed

fields.label: Required compressive pile load (Fc;d)
metadata: description: Design compressive force the pile must resist (ULS, compression only)

util.label: Utilisation Fc;d / Rc;d
util.explanation: ❌ FAIL – increase pile depth or diameter

fields.label: Select location
metadata: description: Click on the map to select a location in the Netherlands.

fields.label: Minimum depth
metadata: description: Only show CPTs with a final depth greater than or equal to this value.

fields.label: Turbine model
metadata: description: Select one of the 10 most common state-of-the-art onshore wind turbines.

options: Vestas V150-4.5 MW, Vestas V162-6.2 MW, Siemens Gamesa SG 5.0-145, Siemens Gamesa SG 6.6-170, GE Vernova 4.5-158, Nordex N163/5.X, Enercon E-160 EP5, Goldwind GW175-6.0, Envision EN-156/4.5, Ming Yang MySE 5.5-155

capacity.label: Rated capacity
capacity.explanation: Nameplate power output of the turbine at rated wind speed.

hub_height.label: Hub height
hub_height.explanation: Distance from ground level to the rotor hub centre.

base_diameter.label: Base diameter
base_diameter.explanation: Outer diameter of the tower at ground level (flange connection).

base_moment.label: Max. moment at base
base_moment.explanation: Extreme design moment = thrust (1100 kN) × hub height (105 m) × load factor (1.35), per IEC 61400-1.

base_horiz_force.label: Max. horizontal force at base
base_horiz_force.explanation: Extreme design shear = thrust (1100 kN) × load factor (1.35), per IEC 61400-1.

base_vert_force.label: Max. vertical force at base
base_vert_force.explanation: Vertical force = total weight (405 t) × g (9.81 m/s²). Represents the gravitational load transferred to the foundation.

rna_weight.label: Rotor-Nacelle Assembly (RNA)
rna_weight.explanation: Combined weight of rotor blades, hub and nacelle.

tower_weight.label: Tower
tower_weight.explanation: Estimated steel tower weight for the selected hub height.

fields.label: Centre-to-centre spacing
metadata: description: Bars are distributed evenly; count is derived from this spacing and the section width.

fields.label: Centre-to-centre spacing
metadata: description: Bars are distributed evenly; count is derived from this spacing and the section width.

fields.label: Minimum allowed spacing
metadata: description: Optimiser stops and raises an error if this spacing is reached without a solution.

entity.name: Agent bridge from Agent sibling smoke 2026-05-17T22:08:42 - Turbine 1 2026-05-17T22:53:06Z

fields.label: Mast diameter
metadata: description: Outer diameter of the wind turbine mast at the foundation interface.

fields.label: Vertical Force
metadata: description: Vertical force applied at the mast ring (positive = downward).

fields.label: Horizontal Force
metadata: description: Horizontal force applied at the mast ring.

fields.label: Overturning Moment
metadata: description: Overturning moment applied at the mast ring (e.g. from wind on the turbine).

fields.label: Slab diameter
metadata: description: Outer diameter of the circular concrete slab.

fields.label: Slab thickness
metadata: description: Thickness of the concrete slab.

fields.label: Number of piles
metadata: description: Number of piles evenly spaced on the pile circle.

fields.label: Pile length
metadata: description: Length of each pile below the slab.

fields.label: Pile diameter
metadata: description: Diameter of each circular concrete pile.

fields.label: Edge distance (slab edge → pile centre)
metadata: label: Edge distance (slab edge → pile centre)
description: Horizontal distance from the slab edge to the centre of the piles.

fields.label: Axial spring stiffness at pile tip
metadata: label: Axial spring stiffness at pile tip
description: Vertical spring stiffness representing the soil resistance at the pile tip (end-bearing component). Typical range: 10 000 – 200 000 kN/m depending on soil type and pile geometry.

fields.label: Horizontal spring stiffness (per unit length)
metadata: label: Horizontal spring stiffness (per unit length)

description: Distributed horizontal (lateral) spring stiffness along the pile shaft, representing the subgrade reaction of the surrounding soil. Typical range: 5 000 – 50 000 kN/m/m for medium-dense sand/clay.

fields.label: SCIA template (.esa)
metadata: description: Upload the SCIA .esa template file. Must contain materials 'C30/37' and 'concrete_slab', and an I/O document named 'output' with Reactions for Combinations.

edges.note: The source produces a signed XML download. The downstream expects a VIKTOR file id, so the bridge needs a file upload/registration step.
Current SCIA result views fail because step_analysis.esa_file is null.
This is an iterative sizing edge, not a simple one-way pipeline.
The rebar app is ready, but the upstream SCIA data is currently unavailable.
